visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey top and a black-and-white checkered skirt, stands in the aisle of a Costco warehouse. She holds a large pink gift box featuring Godiva and Labubu branding. The background is filled with stacks of similar pink boxes and warehouse shelving under bright industrial lighting. (2) The camera zooms in on a price tag above the products, displaying $899. (3) Back to the woman, she gestures excitedly toward the box, pointing at the three distinct decorative tins visible through the window of the packaging. (4) Scene transitions to an indoor home setting. Three metal tins (gold, dark brown, and light pink) are placed on a table alongside several individually wrapped chocolates and decorative cards. (5) Two women are now seated at the table. One is the original woman from Costco, and the other is wearing a white hat and a brown vest. They are unboxing the chocolates, holding up a pink wrapper and a star-shaped dark chocolate piece to the camera. They mimic eating and show exaggerated positive facial expressions. (6) Close-up shots of different chocolate shapes, including a shell-shaped one, held by the woman in the hat. The lighting is warm and bright, focused on the tabletop activity.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 味道竟然...? Godiva & Labubu 聯名巧克力. (2) [Subtitle]: 我的天啊 好市多竟然進這個之前. [Logo]: @cocowine. (3) [Variety]: 強強聯手. (4) [Slogan]: $899. (5) [Variety]: 每卡限購兩組. (6) [Slogan]: 獨一無二的小卡. (7) [Variety]: 也是好吃. (8) [Variety]: 太.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing in the unboxing and tasting segment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a grey top with a checkered skirt. The second woman wears a white bucket hat and a brown/tan vest over a white long-sleeve shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a brightly lit Costco warehouse with high ceilings and metal shelving. The second location is a domestic indoor table setting with soft background decorations and toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins narrating over an upbeat electronic pop track with a heavy kick drum. A shimmering 'magic' SFX plays as the speaker highlights the product. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition SFX marks a cut to the price discussion; speech rate remains fast and energetic. (3) Auditory focus shifts as the sound of plastic crinkling and metal tins clinking becomes prominent, indicating the unboxing. A second female voice enters with excited interjections and laughter. (4) Successive 'ding' sound effects accentuate the reveal of different chocolate types. The background music continues with a steady, high-energy 128 BPM pulse. (5) The primary speaker's tone becomes more descriptive and 'tasting-focused,' with emphasized articulation while the music maintains a consistent volume floor. (6) A final stinger SFX ends the audio sequence as the speakers conclude their review.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Information -> Unboxing -> Tasting -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy consumer recommendation and food review, specifically showcasing a limited-edition collaboration between Godiva and Labubu available at Costco. It uses price comparisons and detailed unboxing to drive urgency and interest in the product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, mention of specific store (Costco), and detailed price comparison indicate a promotional vlog.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard social media influencer format with high arousal vocals and fast-paced editing to maintain viewer engagement.
